# Drip campaign

*Marketing*. An [email marketing strategy][] that sends engagement email messages on a schedule.

Following this strategy, you send a recipient a series of pre-written email messages according to a predetermined schedule. Certain events in the recipient's lifecycle as a customer trigger this schedule. These events include registering for a service or purchasing a product. The campaigns intend to generate or increase customer engagement over a period of time.

[email marketing strategy]: /docs/sendgrid/glossary/email-marketing
